Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this week's episode, we head out with a goal to catch Alaskan Salmon, Lingcod, and all types of other rockfish, but first, we have some more fun in the Halibut grounds while we wait for the wind to calm down.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter, Part 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lunker redfish put tackle to the test on jetties of the Mississippi River Delta in Louisiana.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Seaguar Assistant Marketing Manager, Brian Evans acquires a lesson in light refraction while sight fishing the smallie-rich flats of Lake St. Clair. Kim provides some guidence from the lake bottoms while conversing with Brian topside.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Look at that Fish!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro Vs Pro Father and Children Challenge
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Pro - Father and Children Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us for this episode where one of our local anglers, catches a personal best Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: There is no pill, no prescription, and no vaccination that can cure the effects of PTS better than connecting with fellow Veterans through shared experiences. Stoked On Fishing and Save The Brave to bring awareness to PTSD (Post Traumatic syndrome). In this special episode, we take a group of veterans fishing on the El Dorado out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We catch giant southern California White Sea Bass, Calico Bass, Sheep's Head, and Yellowtail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Fishing with Veterans on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsure of the path his life would take, Brad Peterson decided to join the U.S. Coast Guard. After saving many lives on the water as a part of rescue teams, Brad joined a new life-saving team as a nurse at the Minnesota VA. Today, we head out into the Gulf of Mexico to take Brad on his first saltwater fishing trip.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Coast Guard Veteran Brad Peterson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner spends a day on the water with the editor of Target Walleye, Brett McComas where they discuss the latest trends in walleye fishing.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Kirk show you how to catch big spring crappies relating to bait fish in open water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors - Open Water Crappie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode we pass on the angling tradition to the next generation with some Louisiana bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Passing the Tradition
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Video.summary: Larry fishes with some military vets for a walleye grand slam.
Video.title: Warrior Walleye Shootout

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and his brother Ryan McIntee explore the High Sierra lakes and catch three different trout species.
Video.title: Stoked On Fishing the High Sierras

Image.alt: Stoked On Fishing the High Sierras
Stoked On Fishing the High Sierras
Stoked On Fishing the High Sierras

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin is off to Central Florida to fish with veteran angler Bernie Schultz.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Finding Bass on a river can mean covering miles of water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with professional guide and tournament angler Spencer Clark.
Video.title: Episode 1
